arts.ttl: Agent links make player ‘expressly named’ desire for Amorim at Manchester United – Old Trafford move given ‘preferred option’ status
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s association with agent Ignacio Aguillo is pushing the club to sign Nuno Mendes from Paris Saint Germain. That’s according to journalist Sacha Tavolieri, who reports that Aguilo, who runs AS1 Sports, the agency who represent Amorim, Mendes and Bruno Fernandes, is a key player in Manchester United’s interest in the full back.
